description: Let your feet talk comfort with this pair of flip flops from converse. Crafted from durable and comfortable material, this pair of flip flops speaks volumes of your happy attitude towards life.UpperSoft rubber straps in a thong style with a toe separatorTextured PU foot-bed for cushioned comfort and ease of wearBrand name printed on the foot-bed for styleOut-soleGrooves on the PU out-sole for absolute gripSlipper careWipe surface with a clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not store in direct sunlight
